heading: Interpretation of “program or activity”
label: 1687 Interpretation of “program or activity”
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title IX of which enacted this chapter and amended sections 203 and 213 of Title 29, Labor, and sections 2000c, 2000c–6, 2000c–9, and 2000h–2 of Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare. For complete classification of title IX to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 92–318section 1681 of this title

Findings of Congress, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–259, § 2102 Stat. 28Mar. 22, 1988“The Congress finds that—“(1)certain aspects of recent decisions and opinions of the Supreme Court have unduly narrowed or cast doubt upon the broad application of title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972 [ et seq.], section 504 of the Rehabilitation Act of 1973 [], the Age Discrimination Act of 1975 [ et seq.], and title VI of the Civil Rights Act of 1964 [ et seq.]; and20 U.S.C. 168129 U.S.C. 79442 U.S.C. 610142 U.S.C. 2000d“(2)legislative action is necessary to restore the prior consistent and long-standing executive branch interpretation and broad, institution-wide application of those laws as previously administered.”

Construction, , , provided that:Pub. L. 100–259, § 7102 Stat. 31Mar. 22, 1988“Nothing in the amendments made by this Act [see Short Title of 1988 Amendment note under ] shall be construed to extend the application of the Acts so amended [Education Amendments of 1972, , see Short Title of 1972 Amendment, set out as a note under , Rehabilitation Act of 1973, et seq., Age Discrimination Act of 1975, et seq., and Civil Rights Act of 1964, et seq.] to ultimate beneficiaries of Federal financial assistance excluded from coverage before the enactment of this Act [].”section 1681 of this titlePub. L. 92–318section 1001 of this title29 U.S.C. 70142 U.S.C. 610142 U.S.C. 2000aMar. 22, 1988

Abortion NeutralityThis section not to be construed to force or require any individual or hospital or any other institution, program, or activity receiving Federal funds to perform or pay for an abortion, see , set out as a note under .section 8 of Pub. L. 100–259section 1688 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a department, agency, special purpose district, or other instrumentality of a State or of a local government; or

children.label: B
children.text: the entity of such State or local government that distributes such assistance and each such department or agency (and each other State or local government entity) to which the assistance is extended, in the case of assistance to a State or local government;

children.label: A
children.text: a college, university, or other postsecondary institution, or a public system of higher education; or

children.label: B
children.text: a local educational agency (as defined in section section 7801 of this title), system of vocational education, or other school system;1So in original.1

children.label: i
children.text: if assistance is extended to such corporation, partnership, private organization, or sole proprietorship as a whole; or

children.label: ii
children.text: which is principally engaged in the business of providing education, health care, housing, social services, or parks and recreation; or

children.label: B
children.text: the entire plant or other comparable, geographically separate facility to which Federal financial assistance is extended, in the case of any other corporation, partnership, private organization, or sole proprietorship; or
any other entity which is established by two or more of the entities described in paragraph (1), (2), or (3);
